CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(Status__c ), "Submitted",0.1, "Full Brief received",0.2, "Feasibility Confirmed",0.3, "Proposal Sent to Finance",0.4, "Proposal approved by Finance",0.5, "Proposal sent to GTM",0.6, "Verbally Confirmed",0.8, "Closed Won",1, "Initiated - Future deliveries remaining",1, "Completed",1, "Closed Lost",0, 0 )
CustomField.label: Probability (%) to delete
